title: Ortho Plus Hospital – A Complete Multi Specialty Hospital
heading: Welcome to ORTHOPLUS HOSPITAL
text: Ortho Plus Hospital – A Complete Multi Specialty Hospital Call Us +91-8588884032/ +91-8588884033 Email Us admin@orthoplushospital.in ophospital@gmail.com Menu Home Introduction Specialties OPD Serives Emergency Services Labour and Gynaecology Services Diagnostic Services Physiotherapy Operation Theater Services Pediatrics & Neonatology Services Facilities Charitable Services Ambulance Services Canteen Services Indoor Facilities Hospital Pharmacy Reception & Billing Waste Disposal Hospital Empanelment Career Hospital Panels TPA | Insurance Panel Govt Panel Corporate Panel Contact Us Welcome to ORTHOPLUS HOSPITAL A Complete Multi Specialty Hospital Orthoplus Hospital is a Multi Facility Hospital situated at rural belt of West Delhi, Started in the year 1995 ,It provides comprehensive health care with proper patient care at nominal cost, Hospitals is empanel with CGHS, DGHS, ECHS, MCD and many other Govt. Panels it caters to TPA panels of 42 insurance companies to provide cashless or reimbursement health service. New Delhi being the capital of India is very advanced in the field of medical services but there was no setup within the reach of lacs of rural villages and poor farmer in serious conditions and emergency and most of them use to succumb on way to those hospitals. Taking this fact into consideration Dr. S.K. Gaur had that invincible courage  to lay down the foundation of a hospital in the heart of such (rural ) place which is surrounded by approx 50 villages and catering non-stop service to approximately 6-7 lacs people. OUR EXPERTISE Orthopedics Gynecology Pediatric Dental ENT Plastic Surgery Physiotherapy General Surgery Our Advantages You have a number of reasons to choose us! EMERGENCY –24X7 Emergency department An emergency department (ED), also known as an accident & emergency department (A&E), emergency room (ER), emergency ward (EW) or casualty department, is a medical treatment facility specializing in emergency medicine, the acute care of patients who present without prior appointment; either by their own means or by that of an ambulance. The emergency department is usually found in a hospital or other primary care center OPD Service OPD means an Out Patient Department of a hospital. It is the section of the hospital where patients are provided medical consultations and other allied services. 24 X 7 OPD Service For OPD timings Click Here DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES The Hospital has its own indigenous diagnostics lab where all blood test urine stool, semen analysis etc are being performed, X-ray plain, and special like IVP , HSG, Barium meal , Barium enema, Ultrasound, ECG, EEG, Bone Densitometry, Audiometry, Spirometry is also available. OPERATION THEATER The Operation theater is very well equipped with Automatic Operation Table,LED OT Lights, Operating Microscope with tilting and height raising facility, PHYSIOTHERAPY Under the guidance of experienced physiotherapist all kinds of physiotherapy is done, for example Handling neurological patients, Orthopedics patients etc. Need a Doctor for Check-up? JUST MAKE AN APPOINTMENT GET AN APPOINTMENT 24 x 7 OPD & Emergency Service For Appointment +91-8588884032 / +91-8588884033 Govt. Associations We Empanel !
